audit_result.primary_blocker: 596 of 612 current root-label slots are still missing independent source labels; the attached 16 slots cover only yfinance ^DJI/^GSPC 1d/1w, and direct Manipulation coverage remains incomplete.
audit_result.next_action: Acquire independent source labels for the 596 missing MainRegimeV2 root-label slots, prioritizing non-yfinance cells and intraday/monthly timeframes; keep the 16 attached Kaggle slots as partial source-label evidence only.
